Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 8.1 120 upvotes, 14 comments
  2. Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language 1139 upvotes, 267 comments
  3. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 671 upvotes, 160 comments
  4. Gummy Geometry 48 upvotes, 7 comments
  5. Building a Shell 113 upvotes, 23 comments
  6. Enabling Efficient Sparse Computations Using Linear Algebra Aware Compilers 38 upvotes, 5 comments
  7. Finding a CPU Design Bug in the Xbox 360 79 upvotes, 15 comments
  8. The unlikely story of Teardown Multiplayer 182 upvotes, 43 comments
  9. Kagi Small Web 499 upvotes, 138 comments
  10. Sci-Fi Short Film “There Is No Antimemetics Division” [video] 223 upvotes, 60 comments
  11. Pyodide: a Python distribution based on WebAssembly 149 upvotes, 39 comments
  12. Perlsky Is a Perl 5 Implementation of an at Protocol Personal Data Server 31 upvotes, 5 comments
  13. Give Django your time and money, not your tokens 157 upvotes, 47 comments
  14. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 497 upvotes, 205 comments
  15. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 478 upvotes, 220 comments
  16. Show HN: Antfly: Distributed, Multimodal Search and Memory and Graphs in Go 14 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. Reverse-engineering Viktor and making it Open Source 99 upvotes, 39 comments
  18. Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss' 60 upvotes, 22 comments
  19. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 675 upvotes, 398 comments
  20. Every layer of review makes you 10x slower 419 upvotes, 254 comments
  21. OpenSUSE Kalpa 55 upvotes, 26 comments
  22. Font Smuggler – copy hidden brand fonts into Google Docs 95 upvotes, 51 comments
  23. A proposal to classify happiness as a psychiatric disorder 104 upvotes, 60 comments
  24. Diels-grabsch2: Self Hashing C Program (2019) 9 upvotes, 2 comments
  25. Ryugu asteroid samples contain all DNA and RNA building blocks 82 upvotes, 55 comments
  26. The Official GBBS Pro Repository 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. How long does it take to get last liquid drops from kitchen containers? 33 upvotes, 18 comments
  28. Why Node.js needs a virtual file system 62 upvotes, 42 comments
  29. The American Healthcare Conundrum 450 upvotes, 482 comments
  30. Beyond has dropped “meat” from its name and expanded its high-protein drink line 186 upvotes, 447 comments

Last generated 12:30am, 18 March 2026. Source here.
